entries.title: Gmail - Email from Google
entries.summary:
* Gmail uses a sign-in system to authenticate users.
* Users can sign in with their email or phone number.
* Gmail has a Guest mode for private browsing.
* A CAPTCHA system is used to verify user input.
* Users can create a new account from the sign-in page.
* Forgot email feature is available for account recovery.
* Gmail uses a multi-step sign-in process.
* User authentication is required to access the Gmail service.
* Guest mode provides a private and temporary access to Gmail.
* CAPTCHA is used to prevent automated sign-in attempts.

entries.title: Microsoft Outlook Personal Email and Calendar | Microsoft 365
entries.summary:
* Microsoft Outlook available on desktop, mobile, and web
* Supports multiple email accounts, including Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, iCloud
* Features AI-powered email assistant and generator
* Includes shared calendar and contacts management
* Offers enterprise-grade security with attachment and link scanning
* Supports encryption to prevent forwarding of sensitive information
* Integrates with Word, Excel, and PowerPoint for file editing and sharing
* Includes OneDrive for secure file storage and linking
* Features focused inbox and sweep features for email organization
* Includes Copilot AI with Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription
* Microsoft Outlook integrates with Microsoft Copilot for AI-powered email drafting and summarization.
* Copilot in Outlook supports outlook.com, hotmail.com, live.com, and msn.com email addresses.
* Outlook offers 15 GB of mailbox storage in its free plan.
* Microsoft 365 Basic plan includes 100 GB of mailbox storage and 100 GB of cloud storage.
* Microsoft 365 Personal plan includes 1 TB of secure cloud storage.
* Outlook offers core security features like spam filters in its free plan.
* Advanced Outlook security features are available in Microsoft 365 Basic and Personal plans.
* Microsoft 365 plans include access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and OneDrive apps.
* Outlook is available on web, desktop, and mobile apps.
* Microsoft 365 plans support use on multiple devices simultaneously.
* 1 TB (1000 GB) of secure cloud storage per user
